title: Dürüst-Benchmark + Maruziyet-Rejimi Ayrım Testi -- Stage 0 pre-registration
discipline_note: Committed BEFORE any backtest is run and BEFORE any result is seen. DEC-045 decision rule is FROZEN: no post-hoc relaxation ('disinflation -> full-period', threshold lowering) permitted.
motivation: D-185/D-186 found no entry-alpha. Dogrulama-agent identified blind spot: maruziyet-rejimi (equity<->TLREF switch) was adopted with ZERO testing. Same discipline applied here. Baz-tahsis (static, no prediction) vs aktif-zamanlama (regime signal) tested SEPARATELY against a dumb-barbell benchmark in REAL + post-cost terms.

xu100.caveat: No dividends (~2-4%/yr). Equity side DISADVANTAGED ~2-4%/yr vs true total-return. If PASS with this handicap -> stronger result. Report states this explicitly.

tlref.compound_growth: idx[t] = idx[t-1] * (1 + rate[t]/365); start=1.0. RATE is converted to COMPOUND-GROWTH INDEX. All comparisons use the index series -- never the raw rate.

tufe.type: monthly CPI; ffill to daily compound index

benchmarks.B2_BARBELL: 50% XU100 + 50% TLREF, monthly rebalance (dumb baseline -- main rival)
benchmarks.B4_GOLD_DIAG: DIAGNOSTIC ONLY -- Gold TL/gram. Not in decision rule. Debasement check: if S-A beats TLREF+TUFE but NOT gold -> edge is debasement-beta, not real skill.

S_A_static.note: static barbell; NO prediction required; equity = XU100 proxy

S_B_regime.signal: XU100 200-day MA: close>MA AND MA-slope>0 -> equity; else -> TLREF
S_B_regime.look_ahead_guard: signal at t-close, position from t+1-open
S_B_regime.note: active timing; requires prediction -> subject to random-switch null test

cost_model.S_A_rebalance: 10 bps round-trip per rebalance event (conservative index-fund)
cost_model.S_B_switch: 50 bps round-trip per equity<->TLREF switch (RR-038 calibrated)
cost_model.rationale: S-B switches more than S-A -> more cost; if S-B passes despite higher cost -> stronger result

real_deflation.note: nominal results reported separately for transparency (drift illustration, D-186 lesson)

decision_rule_DEC045.SA_passes_if: best STATIC_EQUITY_RATIOS real annual return > B1_TLREF real AND > B5_TUFE real
decision_rule_DEC045.SB_passes_if: S-B real annual return > best_SA real AND S-B beats random-switch null >= 0.95 pctile
decision_rule_DEC045.no_post_hoc_relaxation: frozen; not loosened after seeing results

random_switch_null.method: same number of switches as S-B in same slice, random dates, same switch cost, same equity/TLREF returns

significance.method: block-bootstrap CI (block=21, n_boot=2000) on daily portfolio return series

caveats: XU100 price-only (no dividends) -> equity disadvantaged ~2-4%/yr -> conservative/muhafazakâr
BIST100 = endeks proxy (no stock selection -- this is exposure test, not selection test)
Disinflation slice ~20 months -> low statistical power; stated explicitly
TUFE deflation best-effort (monthly ffill to daily)
Gold B4 diagnostic: GC=F USD price x USDTRY daily close -> TL/gram approximation
